channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: FIFA World Cup: Tobin Heath on record goals, France and Lamine Yamal
item.description: In an exclusive interview, Tobin Heath shares her insights before World Cup final and discusses best players and teams.

item.title: Guyana ferry with 116 people on board capsizes; more than 50 rescued
item.description: Rescue operations for remaining passengers and crew ongoing, authorities say.

item.title: Iranians suffer from power blackouts during war and heatwave
item.description: Collapsing grid, battered by military strikes and chronic underinvestment, leaves Iranians sweltering in the dark.

item.title: Why is India vetting books in Kashmir in search of ‘anti-national’ content?
item.description: Authorities in disputed region are auditing school, college and public libraries to look for ‘objectionable’ material.

item.title: Gaza cheers for Spain as World Cup final anticipation mounts
item.description: Football fans in Gaza express support for Spain in showdown with Argentina, citing Spanish solidarity with Palestinians.

item.title: Du Plessis makes winning return to UFC with dominant decision over Usman
item.description: South African fighter held the middleweight belt ⁠from January 2024 until August 2025 when he lost to Chimaev.

item.title: World Cup 2026 final: Closing ceremony and half-time show – what to know
item.description: Spain face Argentina in the 2026 World Cup final as musicians perform before kickoff and during the half-time break.

item.title: Five people rescued after Indonesia boat sinks, at least 20 still missing
item.description: The survivors were found clinging to a fish trap and floating debris at sea three days after the boat sank.

item.title: US launches new Iran strikes after two soldiers killed: What’s the latest?
item.description: US strikes target Iran's IRGC after two of its soldiers were killed in Jordan, as Tehran attacks Kuwait and Bahrain.

item.title: From settlements to blocked recovery: Israeli strategy taking shape in Gaza
item.description: Setting up illegal settlements, erasing cities and obstructing aid serve goal of forcing Palestinians out, analysts say.

item.title: Spain fans bring the party to New York before World Cup final
item.description: ‘King [Messi] abdicates, but the prince [Lamine Yamal] takes the throne!’

item.title: Spain vs Argentina: World Cup final predictions, schedule, Messi news
item.description: Spain face Argentina in the World Cup final as Lionel Messi, Lamine Yamal and history dominate the build-up.

item.title: Watch FIFA World Cup: Argentina, Spain make preparations ahead of final
item.description: Latest match highlights, reaction and previews from the FIFA World Cup 2026 in North America.

item.title: Spain vs Argentina: How each team can win the 2026 World Cup final
item.description: Matchups, a style clash, Messi magic, a midfield battle and a passing of the torch could be key narratives in the final.

item.title: Israel demolishes Palestinian home in Masafer Yatta
item.description: Israel demolishes Palestinian home in Masafer Yatta

item.title: Russia launches largest ballistic missile attack on Kyiv since start of war
item.description: Ukraine is particularly vulnerable to ballistic missile attacks due to a shortage of Patriot air defence munitions.

item.title: Spain vs Argentina FIFA World Cup final: Team news, prediction and lineups
item.description: Stars Lionel Messi and Lamine Yamal clash at the biggest match of the biggest World Cup in history.

item.title: The number one health issue in Palestine is the Israeli occupation
item.description: In both Gaza and the West Bank, Israeli policies are devastating Palestinian health with deadly consequences.

item.title: US bombs Iran for eighth-straight night
item.description: The US has launched a new wave of strikes on Iran after two American soldiers were killed by Iranian strikes in Jordan.

item.title: Moment Iranian missiles hit airbase in Jordan killing US soldiers
item.description: A video captures the moment an Iranian missile struck Jordan’s Muwaffaq Salti Airbase, killing two US service members.

item.title: At least one killed as Russian ballistic missiles hit Kyiv
item.description: Russian missiles struck Kyiv and the surrounding region early on Sunday, killing at least one person and injuring nine.

item.title: US hits Iran for 8th consecutive night; Tehran returns fire on Gulf bases
item.description: Sirik and Hajiabad areas in Iran's Hormozgan province targeted as US says revenge for killing of two soldiers.

item.title: Somalia races to save Radio Mogadishu’s fading archive
item.description: A small team is working to digitise decades of Somali history in the country's main public radio station.

item.title: Tate brothers arrested in Miami on rape and sex trafficking charges
item.description: Controversial influencers Andrew and Tristan Tate have been arrested in Miami onrape and sex trafficking charges.

item.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 sees major increase in goals from outside the box
item.description: A trend of teams defending deep has enticed forwards to take shots from outside the penalty area, Jurgen Klinsmann says.
